Title: What's hot in VS Code v1.114? 🔥
Author: Visual Studio Code
Description:
Checkout the release notes - http://aka.ms/VSCode/114

Liam runs through some of the main features released in version 1.114 that enhances your GitHub Copilot Chat experience. Preview videos in the image carousel, copy chat response into markdown, troubleshoot chat problems and the updated #codebase command.
